name: nearmiss-web
description: Framework-free accessible map UI for nearmiss.

scripts.axe: node axe_check.mjs index.html && node axe_check.mjs submit.html && node axe_check.mjs embed.html
scripts.rtl: node rtl_check.mjs index.html && node rtl_check.mjs submit.html && node rtl_check.mjs embed.html
